original_title: OpenAI announces GPT-5.5 with improved reasoning and lower latency
raw_summary: OpenAI today released GPT-5.5, featuring stronger multi-step reasoning, a larger context window, and roughly 30% lower latency compared to the previous model.

original_title: GPT-5.5 just dropped and the reasoning is insane
raw_summary: Discussion thread reacting to the new GPT-5.5 release, with users sharing benchmark comparisons.

original_title: Efficient Long-Context Attention via Sparse Routing
raw_summary: We propose a sparse routing mechanism that reduces the cost of long-context attention while maintaining accuracy on downstream tasks.
